Reliable 3D Printing & Functional Prototyping

At 3dkaarkhana, we deliver fast, precise 3D printing and prototyping solutions. Our team is specialized in rapid development, end-use parts, architectural models, and functional prototypes for industrial and consumer products.

Why Choose Us

  • High accuracy with FDM, SLA, and SLS technologies
  • Quick turnaround with express production options
  • Material options: PLA, PETG, ABS, resin, Nylon, TPU, and composites
  • Engineering-ready design validation and iterative prototyping

Explore our services
